privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetically generated Blender scene. The master rig file is created programmatically at /home/ga/BlenderProjects/assets/master_rig.blend containing a RoboArm_Collection with an armature having three bones (Root, UpperArm, Forearm). The starting scene file at /home/ga/BlenderProjects/shot_scenefile.blend is also synthetically generated with a yellow target sphere. The task requires saving output to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/shot_01_animated.blend. The rotation difference threshold for detecting pose changes is 0.1 radians.
